code:
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear danger statements: "sparks flew," "melted," "toxic smell"
    - Multiple severe defects with no redeeming qualities
    - Explicit warnings to avoid purchase ("don't buy," "stay away")
    - Negative updates indicating complete failure override initial positivity
    - Comparative warnings about inferior product variants
    - Complete functional failure within 3 months of purchase

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws: poor construction, misleading claims, missing parts
    - Functional but creates significant inconvenience ("pain to use")
    - Regret purchase but still works minimally
    - Would not repurchase despite basic functionality
    - Quality issues persisting through updates ("Still breaks after fixes")
    - Long-term durability issues surfacing after initial satisfactory period
    - Explicit comparison statements showing inferiority to expected standards

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons with no clear dominance
    - "It's okay" or "average" with technical limitations
    - Functional for basic needs without enthusiasm
    - Conflicted tone with equivalent praise/criticism
    - Partial success statements ("fine if...", "cheap enough for...")
    - Temporary solutions better than nothing but not ideal

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear satisfaction with specific limitations affecting primary use
    - Effective in primary function but requires notable adaptation
    - "Great BUT..." pattern impacting core utility (e.g., "Works perfectly but noisy")
    - Alternative use success despite main purpose limitations
    - Strong single-attribute praise (design/size) with functional trade-offs
    - Requires usage habit changes to maintain satisfaction
    - Explicit recommendations with reservations ("would recommend with caveats")
    - Eco-friendly/safety praise outweighing minor functional limitations
    - Cost-effective superiority over alternatives despite minor compromises
    - Explicit comparisons showing better value than alternatives despite key drawbacks
    - Decorative success with functional limitations affecting intended use

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified enthusiasm and strong recommendation
    - Exceeds expectations in primary intended use case
    - Sustained satisfaction overriding initial minor issues
    - "Perfect for..." statements with ideal situational fit
    - Concise positivity without negative qualifiers
    - Drawbacks acknowledged but rendered insignificant by benefits
    - Explicit fulfillment of all user-specified requirements/criteria
    - Emotional praise ("love," "best ever") despite inherent trade-offs
    - Specific attribute excellence (color vibrancy, perfect fit) without compromise
    - Long-term reliability (>6 months) validating purchase decision
    - Superior performance in direct A/B comparisons with alternatives
    - Complete satisfaction updates overriding initial minor setup difficulties
    - Cost-effective solutions that fully meet user needs despite basic features
    - Explicit self-rating statements ("I give 5 stars") override minor criticisms
    - Decorative items achieving intended aesthetic goals regardless of functional limitations

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Decorative items: 5 if aesthetic goals achieved regardless of function
    - Size praise: 5 if "perfect size" without negative context
    - Storage solutions: Functional versatility boosts rating despite size limits
    - Negative updates with severe failures override initial positive impressions
    - Comparative statements: Rate based on reviewed item's absolute performance
    - Multi-product comparisons: Base rating on standalone merits
    - Partial numeric contradictions: "4/5 features work" ≠ explicit overall rating
    - Time-weighted evaluation: Final satisfaction 3x > initial issues
    - Explicit criteria fulfillment: 5 if all stated requirements met regardless of minor issues
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Catastrophic failure after 2 weeks. Sparks flew out! Immediate return."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Works but overheats constantly. Not worth the safety risk long-term."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "These storage cubes sort of work but collapse if overloaded. Better than nothing."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Skull decorations achieved perfect spooky vibe despite being oversized - absolute showstopper!"
Rating: 5

Example 5:
Review: "Met all my conditions - easy assembly, perfect fit, and rock-solid stability!"
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "Good quality but thinner than expected. Still reliable for daily use."
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: "Exceeded expectations! Minor wobble doesn't affect functionality."
Rating: 5

Example 8:
Review: "There are three things I require: sturdiness, storage, quiet operation. This delivers all flawlessly."
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: "Does the job adequately but feels cheap. Gets by but wouldn't repurchase."
Rating: 3

Example 10:
Review: "Perfect organizational tool! Sturdy construction overrides minor lid stiffness."
Rating: 5

Example 11:
Review: "I look for easy assembly, durability, and value. Checks every box despite basic appearance."
Rating: 5

Example 12:
Review: "Beautiful but wrinkles instantly. Premium look requires constant ironing."
Rating: 4

Example 13:
Review: "Mastered steam buttons after initial confusion - now cleans floors impeccably!"
Rating: 5

Example 14:
Review: "Great for leftovers! Cheaper than alternatives and saves my good containers."
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (30 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 13
  gold 5 -> 4: 9
  gold 3 -> 4: 3
  gold 4 -> 3: 1
  gold 2 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "These skull and bones are plenty big to be seen from a distance. You get two in the package and they measure 21"x18.5". You could use them in your home or office. Even though these are the pirate skull and bones, they are smiling and don't look scary..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This is a sharp well made tablecloth. It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction. The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "They're okay, but not extraordinary. They seem to be well made and are holding up so far with no problems, and the fact that you can toss them into the washing machine to be cleaned is nice. They're just a bit on the thin side as well, though, so you..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "This is a nice little bread plate. It works well for small amounts, about half of a French bread loaf. Not big enough for large family dinners."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This really is a beautiful plate. You can definitely see and feel the Lenox quality. It is the perfect size for setting out cookies or cheeses at a dinner party. I really am looking forward to setting this out this year. Just keep in mind it does not..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [2, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Nice, bright napkins for your inside or outside dining. You get six napkins and they are a generous 20x20. They are also 100% cotton. They are well sewn and the print is only on one side. These are machine washable, but they require a low heat to dry..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I really like these heat resistant mitts. I can easily fit my hand in the pocket to pick up hot items pots, pans, roasters, cookie sheets, you name it. I can also use the pocket to cover the ends of hot pots. This is important because I just had to o..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I bought these mainly for sending leftovers. It is easier than sending my rubbermaid containers because I am not out much money if they don't come back."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 30 errors, 19 borderline out of 76 examples."}
